signals.npcLine: The cryptomarket’s bleeding, shadows spreading fast.
signals.questPulse: Watch your credits—global crypto tides turned sour.
signals.worldFeed: Massive dip shakes all nodes; risk to assets rises.
signals.clueEvent: Market cap bleeding triggers black market shifts.

signals.npcLine: REQ token flickers—spiking interest, uncertain trust.
signals.questPulse: Scan REQ batches, anticipate rogue contracts.
signals.worldFeed: REQ usage surges amid unstable network flows.
signals.clueEvent: REQ demand rises; smuggler runs set to increase.

signals.npcLine: Old rave circuits spark offline; data may resurface.
signals.questPulse: Recover lost RAVE fragments; valuable relics hide secrets.
signals.worldFeed: Digital echoes of RAVE haunt abandoned sectors.
signals.clueEvent: RAVE nodes go dark; scavengers move to exploit.

signals.npcLine: OVPP hotspots emerge—potential for illicit gains.
signals.questPulse: Hack OVPP vaults before corporation eyes lock down.
signals.worldFeed: OVPP system breaches reported in industrial zones.
signals.clueEvent: OVPP data dumps trigger conflict between gangs.

signals.npcLine: Fear grips cryptomarket runners; trust crumbles slow.
signals.questPulse: Replace shaken traders; fear clouds cyber alleys.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment dips low; shadows grow between factions.
signals.clueEvent: Market fear index spikes, affects black market deals.
